mapper.select: SELECT user_id, course_id, lesson_id, progress, is_completed, last_learn_time, created_time, updated_time FROM learning_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT user_id, course_id, lesson_id, progress, is_completed, last_learn_time, created_time, updated_time FROM learning_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND lesson_id = #{lessonId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) FROM learning_record lr1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM learning_record lr2 WHERE lr2.user_id = lr1.user_id AND lr2.course_id = lr1.course_id AND lr2.is_completed = 0 )

SELECT ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND is_completed = 1) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lesson l INNER JOIN chapter c ON l.chapter_id = c.id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}), 2 ) as progress
